goal: Unify the interface nomenclature and visual branding across the system (MainMenu, Community, Battle, Story) strictly adhering to V9 standards.
constraints: Strictly follow V9 Naming Convention (百家文库, 锋芒演武, 名士风采, etc.).
Maintain V9 Mineral Aesthetic (Ink, Gold, Ivory).
Ensure semantic consistency between menu labels and internal titles.
deliverables: Unified titles in CommunityScreen.tsx and CharactersView.tsx
Internal naming audit in Battle and Level components
